zh.lifeSummary: 當William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax於大約1091年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特時，他的父親Ralph Paynel34歲，母親Maud Surdeval19歲。他於1130年之前與d'Avranches在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1145年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax于大约1091年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特时，他的父亲Ralph Paynel34岁，母亲Maud Surdeval19岁。他于1130年之前与d'Avranches在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1145年之后。

en.Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Lower Nor: Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France

nameMeanings.name: Paynel,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax was born about 1091, in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Ralph Paynel, was 34 and his mother, Maud Surdeval, was 19. He married d'Avranches before 1130, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 1145.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax est né environ 1091, à Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Ralph Paynel, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud Surdeval, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé d'Avranches avant 1130, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 1145.

de.lifeSummary: Als William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax um 1091 in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Paynel 34 und seine Mutter Maud Surdeval 19. Er hat vor 1130 in Frankreich d'Avranches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 1145.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax è nato il circa 1091 nel Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph Paynel, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud Surdeval, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato d'Avranches prima del 1130, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1145.

ja.lifeSummary: William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Draxが約1091年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスレス モウティエルス-ヒューバートで生まれた時，父Ralph Paynelは34歳，母Maud Surdevalは19歳であった。1130年以前にフランスでd'Avranchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1145年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax(이)가 대략 1091년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 레스 모우티어스-후버트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Paynel(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Surdeval(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1130년 이전 프랑스에서 d'Avranches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1145년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax nasceu aproximadamente 1091, em Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ralph Paynel, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud Surdeval, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com d'Avranches antes 1130, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1145.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax родился около 1091 г. в местности лесь моутиирс-хубирт, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph Paynel было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Surdeval, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени d'Avranches перед 1130 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 1145 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax nació aproximadamente 1091, en Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ralph Paynel, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maud Surdeval, tenía 19 años. Se casó con d'Avranches antes de 1130, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1145.
